title: gayophytum diffusum var. typicum
intro: Gayophytum diffusum var. typicum, also known as spreadsage or rabbit-tongue plant, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, due to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. In herbal preparations, Gayophytum diffusum var. typicum is often used in tinctures, teas, and salves to support skin health and aid in the treatment of minor wounds.
